appReviewText: We are committed to providing the best user experience. If you enjoy using this app, please consider leaving a 5-star rating 😘
appReviewText2: Thank you for your support. We will keep improving the app!
agreementText:
To ensure the app runs properly and improve your experience, we will process necessary device and app information, network and diagnostic information, and in-app usage data after your consent. This data is used to provide basic functions, troubleshoot issues, and improve the experience.

The relevant data may be processed by service providers we use. We will not sell your personal information. Please read the Privacy Policy and User Agreement for detailed information.
agreementAgree: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and End User License Agreement, and agree to the processing of necessary data as described above
agreementTipText: Please agree to the Privacy Policy and End User License Agreement
deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
exitConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to exit?
cameraTakeFailed: Camera access failed. Please check your camera permissions in Settings.
errorNetworkLost: No internet connection detected. Please check your network settings and try again.
errorRequestTimeoutToRetry: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
tipsRestartOrReinstall: Please try restarting the app. If the problem persists, try reinstalling.
tipsUseLimits: You have {value} attempts left today. Continue?
tipsNetworkText: According to Apple requirements, network permission is required for the app to function properly. For a better experience, please grant network access.
upgradeText: 🌟 A new version is here! Better design and smoother experience. Try it now!
iapPurchaseFailedMsg: An error occurred during the purchase. Tap "Solutions" for details and fixes.
iapRestoreConfirmMsg: If you have previously purchased premium features on another device or after reinstalling, we can help restore your access. Please make sure you are signed in with the same account used for the purchase.
iapRestoreSuccessMsg: Your premium access has been successfully restored. Enjoy all the exclusive benefits!
iapRestoreFailedMsg: An error occurred during the restore. Tap "Solutions" for details and fixes.
iapUnlockAllFeatures: Unlock all premium features with lifetime access!
iapLimitedTimeOfferText: One-time payment, unlock all premium features!
iapFamilyShareSetTitle: How to set up Family Sharing?
iapFamilyShareSetDesc: To set up Family Sharing, go to Settings > Apple ID > Family Sharing and follow the instructions.
iapProductSelectPlan: Choose the plan that suits you
iapFTISubText1: Unlock all features and enjoy premium benefits
iapFTISubText2: You can enjoy full access for the day or cancel anytime.
iapFTISubText3: You will be charged later, but you can cancel anytime.
iapCancelDesc: To cancel, go to Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions, select the app, then tap "Cancel Subscription" and confirm.
solutionNetworkConnectionDesc: A stable network connection is required to complete the payment
solutionAppStoreAccountDesc: You must be signed in with a valid App Store account
solutionPaymentMethodDesc: Your account must have a valid payment method
solutionCheckNetworkDesc: Make sure your device is connected to a stable WiFi or cellular network
solutionVerifyAppStoreDesc: Go to Settings > App Store and make sure you're signed in
solutionCheckPaymentDesc: Make sure your payment method is valid and not expired
solutionRestartAppDesc: Close the app completely and reopen it
solutionUpdateSystemDesc: The minimum supported version is iOS 15.0, but we recommend updating to iOS 18.0 or later
solutionRetryDesc: Retrying may resolve most issues automatically
solutionContactSupportDesc:
If the issue persists, please contact our support team

settingsRequirementRequestTip: If you have any new ideas or features you'd like to see, just let us know. We may add them in future updates.
settingsFeedbackTip1: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to contact us. We are always working to improve your experience.
settingsFeedbackTip2: Thank you for your feedback. We will handle it promptly!
settingsFeedbackTip3: Your feedback is very important to us. We will continue improving based on your suggestions.
settingsFeedbackTip4: Would you like to send your feedback via email?
inputRoleNumber: Input rules: Must be a valid integer. The minimum value must be greater than or equal to 0 and less than the maximum. The maximum value must be less than {max} and greater than the minimum.
